author: mark
text: Delivery-link resolution (SPEC §6): task.delivered_in hint, tag-fallback via git log -F --grep, hint_stale detection, bl show display, json exposure. bl review sets the hint in the same state-branch commit as the review transition. 6 conformance tests cover happy path, rebase (hint stale but tag resolves), reset past tag (returns None), never-reviewed (no hint), and full review+close cycle.
